step_rationale: Lipoprotein lipid component; oxidative degradation in atherosclerosis and MI-prone states.
mechanism: Phosphatidylinositol is a structural lipoprotein lipid altered by oxidative stress; reduced levels in MI-prone and vascular disease states mark lipid peroxidation and dysfunction.
